picks.quote: I still think caner is skilled and dangerous enough... should we count out the killer gorilla no I think he's a very underrated and smart fighter

his last three losses all came to top 10 featherweights... Calvin kar's last two wins also came against top 15 guys and he's probably fighting for contract odds just way too far apart got to take a dab on Calvin
I think you're gonna get a good performance from him I think he's gonna flash elements of danger but him losing a decision seems fairly concrete for me
